question_text: Which of the following is the correct circuit symbol for a battery?

options.label: A
options.text: A long line next to a short line

options.label: B
options.text: A circle with a cross inside

options.label: C
options.text: Two parallel lines of equal length

correct_answer: A) A long line next to a short line
explanation: The battery symbol shows one long line (positive terminal) and one short line (negative terminal) side by side. This is the standard circuit symbol taught in Year 8 physics.
